title: Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bata India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
